titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Consul General at Shanghai ( Cabot )

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Consul General at Shanghai ( Cabot )
div.p: 1359. Urtel 2627 July 6.Not printed. Dept inclined view favorably ur departure with AmbFor documentation regarding departure of Ambassador Stuart, see pp. 723 ff. on date now tentatively set Jul 15. Chief problem possible unfavorable reaction Amer community Shanghai ur departure this critical stage. Seems little or no likelihood ur successor could arrive Shanghai near future both because absence transportation facilities due closure port and question Commie documentation for his entry.

If decision made authorize ur departure, Dept desires McConaughyWalter P. McConaughy, Consul at Shanghai. assume charge time ur departure. Dept chose McConaughy Shanghai assignment with view having him assume charge during ur temporary absence or interregnum prior arrival ur successor and his executive officer functions given him with such possibility in mind. Subsequent this decision Chase promotion has made latter ur senior subordinate but Dept continues believe McConaughy should assume charge in event ur departure in view his special qualifications and his being chosen for that purpose. Dept certain Chase will appreciate its continuing confidence in him and desire afford him fullest opportunity devote time important polit reporting and problems requiring Chi language officer’s special qualifications.
Dept would appreciate ur comments foregoing prior making final decision re ur return US.
